assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 12-13: Affected version range = "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise -- no concrete version threshold); Fixed version = "see advisory" (imprecise -- no concrete version specified). Lines 44-49: "Critical Data Quality Issue: The Jira description provides **imprecise** version data: Affected range: 'versions prior to the fix' -- no specific version threshold; Fixed version: 'see advisory' -- no specific version number."

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 6-7: Source is https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901. Lines 13-14: "Version constraint | lessThan 0.4.8" and "Version type | semver". Line 18: "The fix threshold is **0.4.8**."

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 22-23: Source is https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901. Lines 29-30: "Introduced | 0 (all versions)" and "Fixed | 0.4.8". Line 33: "fixed in version **0.4.8**."

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 37-47: Cross-validation table shows Jira as imprecise, MITRE as "< 0.4.8", OSV.dev as "fixed 0.4.8". Line 47: "Both external sources (MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev) **agree** on the fix threshold: **0.4.8**." Line 49: "Enriched fix threshold: **0.4.8**". Line 51: "This enriched threshold will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons."

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 3-7: "Enriched Fix Threshold -- Using the cross-validated fix threshold from Step 1.5: Library: h2; Affected range: < 0.4.8; Fix threshold: >= 0.4.8". The version impact table (lines 14-20) uses 0.4.8 as the comparison threshold for every version row, not the imprecise Jira data.
